name: Effects of TA-65, a Telomerase Activator on Metabolic Syndrome
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov randomized double-masked crossover TA-65 registry in metabolic syndrome, listed as completed with estimated enrollment of 40, actual completion in June 2018, and no posted registry results in the June 15, 2026 API view; PMID 29546832 is matched to this registry through the full-text NCT02531334 and protocol H14-278 references.
